name: Kevin Weil
role:
VP Science @OpenAI, BoD @Cisco @nature_org, LTC @USArmyReserve
Ex: Pres @Planet, Head of Product @Instagram @Twitter
❤️ @elizabeth ultramarathons kids cats math
summary:
I’m inspired by young people putting frontier AI to work in science in new and surprising ways.

We recently met a young astronomer who used AI to analyze massive datasets. He identified 1.5 million new celestial objects in space, and the head of NASA offered him a job and a ride...
summaryEn:
I’m inspired by young people putting frontier AI to work in science in new and surprising ways.

We recently met a young astronomer who used AI to analyze massive datasets. He identified 1.5 million new celestial objects in space, and the head of NASA offered him a job and a ride...
analysis: 这条推文核心观点是：年轻人在科学领域创新应用前沿AI技术，一位年轻天文学家利用AI分析大量数据，发现150万颗新天体，获得NASA认可和机会。这体现了AI在科学探索中的巨大潜力。

summary:

name: Nan Yu
summary:
Sometimes you have to take a moment, step back, and realize how insane this is. 

Codex noticed that I included a line in a prompt that obliquely references a feature that's behind a feature flag elsewhere in the app, and flagged it.

What % of human reviewers would catch this? h...
summaryEn:

Codex noticed that I included a line in a prompt that obliquely references a feature that's behind a feature flag elsewhere in the app, and flagged it.

What % of human reviewers would catch this? h...
analysis: AI助手Nan Yu在推文中表达了对AI强大功能的惊讶，指出Codex能够识别出人类难以察觉的代码细节，引发对AI能力与人类认知差异的思考。

name: Google Labs
role: Google’s home for our latest AI tools and experiments.
summary: Thanks for exploring virtual try-on with our experimental app Doppl. Your feedback has helped us refine the technology and you can use our virtual try-on tech on product listings and image results across Google. As we make this transition, the Doppl app will officially shut down...
summaryEn: Thanks for exploring virtual try-on with our experimental app Doppl. Your feedback has helped us refine the technology and you can use our virtual try-on tech on product listings and image results across Google. As we make this transition, the Doppl app will officially shut down...

name: Alex Albert
summary:
Highly recommend reading this guest post by theoretical physicist Matthew Schwartz to get a sense of how AI is helping science.

He found Opus 4.5 to be roughly the level of a second-year grad student and it helped him accelerate his research by 10x. https://t.co/mSk8lOczdB
summaryEn:
Highly recommend reading this guest post by theoretical physicist Matthew Schwartz to get a sense of how AI is helping science.

He found Opus 4.5 to be roughly the level of a second-year grad student and it helped him accelerate his research by 10x. https://t.co/mSk8lOczdB
analysis: AI助力科学进步，理论物理学家Matthew Schwartz通过AI工具Opus 4.5大幅提升研究效率，将其比作研究生水平，强调AI在科研领域的潜力。

name: Aaron Levie
role: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
summary:
Computer use and the ability to write and run code on the fly are the ultimate primitives for agents to be able to take on more and more tasks in knowledge work. 

Most work requires hopping between multiple applications, and working with broad sets of data, in a workflow, and ag...
summaryEn:
Computer use and the ability to write and run code on the fly are the ultimate primitives for agents to be able to take on more and more tasks in knowledge work. 

Most work requires hopping between multiple applications, and working with broad sets of data, in a workflow, and ag...
analysis: 计算机使用和即时编写、运行代码的能力是知识工作者承担更多任务的关键基础。大多数工作需要在多个应用程序和大量数据之间切换，而智能体将需要这样的能力。

name: Matt Turck
role: VC at @FirstMarkCap.  Host: MAD Podcast; Organizer: Data Driven NYC, Author: MAD Landscape.
summary: Going to be hard to explain to future generations that there was a time, before Claude Code, when people with an idea would sometimes spend years looking for a “technical co-founder”
summaryEn: Going to be hard to explain to future generations that there was a time, before Claude Code, when people with an idea would sometimes spend years looking for a “technical co-founder”
analysis: AI技术革新显著， Claude Code时代来临，缩短了寻找技术合作伙伴的时间，颠覆了传统创业模式。

name: Nikunj Kothari
role: partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter, @opendoor, @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧
summary:
Being in SF means constantly hearing the same three things (jevons paradox, goodharts law and the bitter lesson) over and over again..

Good reminder (even for me) to read more history, art and sci-fi!
summaryEn:
Being in SF means constantly hearing the same three things (jevons paradox, goodharts law and the bitter lesson) over and over again..

Good reminder (even for me) to read more history, art and sci-fi!
analysis: Nikunj Kothari在推文中强调，身处硅谷需不断重温经济规律，并提醒自身多阅读历史、艺术和科幻，以获得更广阔的视野。

name: Peter Steinberger
role: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take over the world @openclaw🦞
summary:
Pretty much every PR I review:

0) review <URL> [codex does it's thing and finds issues]
1) is the issue clear? [if not, trash PR]
2) is this the best possible fix? [95% of the time no]
3) continue discussion, consider tradeoffs, usually rewrite PR
